dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition 1: 14-day returns >= -8% (price decline threshold). Entry condition 2: volume compared against price_pos_20 as proxy for volume percentile rank (volume at or below 40th percentile). Entry condition 3: close > dc_lower (Donchian 14-day low) confirms reversal initiation after decline period. Exit at 5% gain uses returns >= 0.05. Exit at 3% stop-loss and 5-day hold max captured in stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max. Note: Exact volume percentile calculation (40th percentile of 20-day average) cannot be precisely replicated with allowed indicators; price_pos_20 provides relative position approximation.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition 1: 14-day returns >= -8% (price decline threshold). Entry condition 2: volume compared against price_pos_20 as proxy for volume percentile rank (volume at or below 40th percentile). Entry condition 3: close > dc_lower (Donchian 14-day low) confirms reversal initiation after decline period. Exit at 5% gain uses returns >= 0.05. Exit at 3% stop-loss and 5-day hold max captured in stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max. Note: Exact volume percentile calculation (40th percentile of 20-day average) cannot be precisely replicated with allowed indicators; price_pos_20 provides relative position approximation.

source_rule_text: Buy stocks that have declined sharply on declining volume over a recent period, as the low volume indicates insufficient buyers for distressed sellers, creating a systematic tendency for mean reversion in the following period.
